name: launchkit
description: AI-Powered Go-To-Market Teammate — paste a GitHub repo, get a full launch kit

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:shared: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/video && npm run build -w packages/asset-generators
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/worker && npm run build -w apps/cron && npm run build -w apps/workflows && npm run build -w apps/dashboard
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,worker,pika,cron,wf,dash -c blue,green,red,yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/worker" "npm run dev:pika-worker" "npm run dev -w apps/cron" "npm run dev:workflows" "npm run dev -w apps/dashboard"
scripts.dev:workflows: render workflows dev -- npm run dev -w apps/workflows
